title: Network error when logging into Xano AUTH app
symptom: When attempting to log in to the Xano AUTH app using the 'test' data source, a 'NETWORK ERROR' occurs. The logs indicate that the correct data source is being passed.
applies_when: Selecting a specific data source for authentication
not_this_if: Error does not occur when using the live data source
root_cause: The Xano AUTH app requires specific headers to be allowed in CORS management. If the necessary headers, such as 'X-Data-Source', are not included, network errors can occur during authentication attempts.
fix_steps: Access the CORS management settings of your API group
Add 'X-Data-Source' to the list of allowed headers
Retry logging into the Xano AUTH app
agent_instruction: Add 'X-Data-Source' to the allowed headers in CORS management and save the settings.
